documents.title: Engineering Onboarding
documents.text:
# Getting set up
Clone the monorepo and run make bootstrap. Ask in #eng-help if it fails.

# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy for engineering is 10% of base salary, paid in the month following quarter end.

# On call
Rotation is weekly. Escalate to the on-call lead after 15 minutes with no ack.

documents.title: Incident Runbook
documents.text:
# Sev1
Page the on-call. Open an incident channel. Assign a comms lead before debugging.

# Error codes
ERR_4021 means the payment provider rejected the token. Retry with a fresh token, do not retry the charge.

# Rollback
Roll back first, diagnose second. A rollback is always cheaper than a long investigation under load.

documents.title: Sales Compensation Plan
documents.text:
# Commission
Base plus commission at 8% of closed ARR.

# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy for sales is commission based and uncapped above quota.

# Discounts
Anything above 20% needs CRO approval.

documents.title: HR Salary Bands
documents.text:
# Bands
L3 engineers are banded 18-26 LPA. L4 is 26-40 LPA.

# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy and every individual salary band are recorded here. This document is HR only.

# Reviews
Calibration happens twice a year.

documents.title: Q3 Revenue Forecast
documents.text:
# Forecast
Q3 ARR forecast is 4.2M, up 12% QoQ.

# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy has been modelled at 3% of payroll for planning purposes.

documents.title: CEO Private Notes
documents.text:
# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy is under review and may be cut next year. Do not share.

# Hiring
Considering a freeze in Q4.

documents.title: All Hands Notes
documents.text:
# Agenda
Q3 numbers, roadmap, hiring.

# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy will be discussed at the next all hands. Bring questions.

documents.title: Onboarding for Dave
documents.text:
# Welcome
Your manager will walk you through the quarterly bonus payout policy in week one.

# Accounts
Request access in #it-help.

documents.title: Employee Handbook (2019)
documents.text:
# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy is an annual lump sum paid every December.

# Dress code
Business casual.

documents.title: Untitled Draft
documents.text:
# Bonus
The quarterly bonus payout policy draft that nobody owns and nobody should see.
